Video.summary: Chief Financial Officers now play a critical role in shaping corporate strategy and positioning organizations; profiling AT&T CFO Pascal Desroches, who has partnered with John Stankey to restructure the company.
Video.title: Pascal Desroches, AT&T

Video.summary: Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly sit with Super Bowl winner and Goldman Sachs Managing Director Justin Tuck to talk about the pressure of playing in New York and his transition from football to finance.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Deal With Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly
Video.title: From Football to Finance with Justin Tuck

Image.alt: From Football to Finance with Justin Tuck
From Football to Finance with Justin Tuck
From Football to Finance with Justin Tuck
From Football to Finance with Justin Tuck

Video.summary: Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly talk with Emmanuel Acho about his reinvention from NFL linebacker to media leader, his show "Uncomfortable Conversations" and his new effort, Speakeasy.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Deal With Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly
Video.title: How Emmanuel Acho Reinvents Himself

Video.summary: Emily Chang meets Reese Witherspoon to discuss the company's founding mission and what's next for Hollywood.
Video.title: Reese Witherspoon

Video.summary: Emily Chang meets Alexis Ohanian at Athlos NYC, an annual women's track and field event; they discuss his athletics portfolio, venture career and what really happened when he left Reddit.
Video.title: Alexis Ohanian

Video.summary: Gina Goetter is the CFO and COO of Hasbro; she's the architect of the company's transformation, while diversifying its manufacturing footprint and investing in Hasbro's video game ambitions.
Video.title: Gina Goetter, Hasbro

Video.summary: Emily Chang meets California's First Couple, Gavin Newsom and Jennifer Siebel Newsom: though the next presidential election is more than two years away, the governor is widely considered the frontrunner for the Democratic nomination.
Video.title: Sitting Down With the Newsoms

Video.summary: An investigation of Iran's shadow fleet, which traffics billions in oil and weapons across the Middle East and Russia, revealing how sanctions evasion sustains the regime.
Video.title: The Oil Kingpin Who Built A Shadow Empire

Image.alt: The Oil Kingpin Who Built A Shadow Empire
The Oil Kingpin Who Built A Shadow Empire
The Oil Kingpin Who Built A Shadow Empire
The Oil Kingpin Who Built A Shadow Empire

Video.summary: Chinese companies dominate the EV battery supply chain and are expanding rapidly outside their home market. Meanwhile, competitors are looking to new chemistries to leapfrog the leading tech.
Video.title: The Race to Challenge China's EV Lead

Image.alt: The Race to Challenge China's EV Lead
The Race to Challenge China's EV Lead
The Race to Challenge China's EV Lead
The Race to Challenge China's EV Lead

Video.summary: "Bloomberg Originals" offers bold takes for curious minds on today's biggest topics; hosted by experts covering stories you haven't seen and viewpoints you haven't heard, you'll discover cinematic, data-led shows that investigate the intersection of business and culture; exploring every angle of climate change, technology, finance, sports and beyond, "Bloomberg Originals" is business as you've never seen it.
Video.title: Bloomberg Originals

Video.summary: A weekly program telling the stories of capitalism from around the world, David Westin in New York hosts.
Video.title: Bloomberg Wall Street Week

Video.summary: A weekly program telling the stories of capitalism from around the world, David Westin in New York hosts.
Video.title: Bloomberg Wall Street Week

Video.summary: A weekly program telling the stories of capitalism from around the world, David Westin in New York hosts.
Video.title: Bloomberg Wall Street Week

Video.summary: A weekly program telling the stories of capitalism from around the world, David Westin in New York hosts.
Video.title: Bloomberg Wall Street Week

Video.summary: Francine Lacqua speaks with Emma Grede, chief executive and co-founder of Good American and founding partner of Skims.
Video.grandparentTitle: Leaders with Francine Lacqua: The Podcast
Video.title: Emma Grede: How She Built Good American and Helped Grow Skims

Image.alt: Emma Grede: How She Built Good American and Helped Grow Skims
Emma Grede: How She Built Good American and Helped Grow Skims
Emma Grede: How She Built Good American and Helped Grow Skims
Emma Grede: How She Built Good American and Helped Grow Skims

Video.summary: Mishal Husain brings her signature blend of curiosity and tenacity to weekly conversations with world leaders, business titans and cultural icons, revealing who they really are and how they see the world changing around them.
Video.title: The Mishal Husain Show

Video.summary: Wells Fargo's CEO Charlie Scharf addresses his tenure in the position, regulatory issues and the changes within the financial industry during a conversation with David Rubenstein.
Video.grandparentTitle: The David Rubenstein Show: Peer to Peer Conversations
Video.title: Charlie Scharf, Wells Fargo CEO

Video.summary: Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly speak with Steve Young about his journey from NFL stardom to managing a $10 billion fund, discussing the challenges and lessons learned along the way.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Deal With Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly
Video.title: How NFL Legend Steve Young Built a $10 Billion Fund

Image.alt: How NFL Legend Steve Young Built a $10 Billion Fund
How NFL Legend Steve Young Built a $10 Billion Fund
How NFL Legend Steve Young Built a $10 Billion Fund
How NFL Legend Steve Young Built a $10 Billion Fund

Video.summary: Humanoid robots that use AI are going mainstream, but they're far from proven. With billions of dollars invested, can they deliver real-world value, or will they fall short of the hype?
Video.title: The Race To Merge AI With Humanoid Robots

Image.alt: The Race To Merge AI With Humanoid Robots
The Race To Merge AI With Humanoid Robots
The Race To Merge AI With Humanoid Robots
The Race To Merge AI With Humanoid Robots

Video.summary: Mishal Husain brings her signature blend of curiosity and tenacity to weekly conversations with world leaders, business titans and cultural icons, revealing who they really are and how they see the world changing around them.
Video.title: The Mishal Husain Show

Video.summary: A recap of Bloomberg Invest New York, featuring interviews with leaders in asset management, banking, private capital and wealth.
Video.title: Best of Bloomberg Invest 2026

Video.summary: The news doesn't stop when markets close; hosts David Gura, Christina Ruffini and Lisa Mateo bring clarity, context and a bit of humor to the weekend's biggest headlines, LIVE from New York.
Video.title: Bloomberg This Weekend

Video.summary: "Bloomberg Originals" offers bold takes for curious minds on today's biggest topics; hosted by experts covering stories you haven't seen and viewpoints you haven't heard, you'll discover cinematic, data-led shows that investigate the intersection of business and culture; exploring every angle of climate change, technology, finance, sports and beyond, "Bloomberg Originals" is business as you've never seen it.
Video.title: Bloomberg Originals
